svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 35px; margin-left: 370px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 618px; height: 1px; padding-top: 105px; margin-left: 61px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
tier3 — エンドユーザー層
業務アプリ / アプリ配信ポータル / 端末管理
言語自由: C# / Go / TypeScript (React) / MAUI

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 618px; height: 1px; padding-top: 210px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
tier2 — ドメインサービス層
業務ドメインロジック (マイクロサービス群)
言語自由: C# / Go

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 618px; height: 1px; padding-top: 350px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
tier1 — 共通基盤サービス層 (k1s0 の核心)
公開 API: k1s0.Auth / Log / Telemetry / State / PubSub /
Service / Audit / Decision / Workflow / Secrets
内部実装 (tier2 / tier3 からは不可視):
Go ファサード (Dapr 隠蔽) + Rust 自作領域 + 多言語クライアント

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 206, 204), rgb(81, 45, 43)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 618px; height: 1px; padding-top: 505px; margin-left: 61px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
infra — インフラ層
Kubernetes (kubeadm) / Istio (mTLS) / Envoy Gateway
Kafka (Strimzi) / PostgreSQL (CloudNativePG) / Valkey
Loki / Grafana Tempo / Prometheus / Grafana / Pyroscope

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 178px; height: 1px; padding-top: 77px; margin-left: 721px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
operation — 運用横断
(全層を横断する)
Argo CD
Backstage
Harbor
Renovate
OpenBao
Litmus

div.div: 矢印: 依存方向 (上→下の一方向のみ許可)

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 635px; margin-left: 66px;

div.div: 依存ルール: 上位層は 1 つ下の層にのみ依存する。tier3 から tier1 / infra への直接依存は不可。infra への直接依存は tier1 のみに許可。
